title: Chaseter's Spoopy Modpack
description: A modpack for Chaseter's Spoopy challenge video!
body:
# Chaseter's Spoopy Modpack

This modpack is made for Chaseter's spoopy special challenge video on YouTube.

[Watch the trailer!](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=XPQB_n_bEk8)

## Future MC
For the best experience playing in this pack and to follow along with Chaseter on YouTube, install the Future MC mod: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/future-mc

Due to them copyrighting their mod it's not possible to include it in this pack.

## Texturepacks
For this pack 2 texturepacks has been included:

Tissous Zombie Pack:  
https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/tissous-zombie-pack-optifine-1-7x-1-19

Fresh Animations:  
https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/fresh-animations

## Optifine
If you want the best experience I recommend you install Optifine, but due to their copyright we're unable to include it in the pack, you can download it here: https://optifine.net

## Mod Attributions
Some of the mods in this pack requires that credit is given, so credit goes to the following mods that are used in this pack:

Corpse:  
https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/corpse

Vic's Modern Warfare Mod:  
https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/vics-modern-warfare-mod

## Sponsor
